expectations.evidence: Headline: '212 784 EUR — presne 2 216 EUR pod EU limitom 215 000 EUR'. Timeline shows the amount clearly.
Timeline: '2025-07-02: Dodatok c. 1  541 259.81 EUR (navysenie o 154%)'. Also: 'celkovo presahuje povodnu sumu o 328 475.96 EUR'.
No revenue, profit, equity, or FinStat data mentioned. Questions reference FinStat as next step: 'Ake boli financne parametre DREVEX s.r.o.'
No foaf.sk connections, RPVS ownership, or person names fabricated. Question 1 asks about prepojenia as future investigation.
ASCII diagram: 'Obec Liptovske Sliace' at top, '100% zmlup' arrow, 'DREVEX s.r.o.' below with '912 875 EUR celkom'.
